input:
{"deliverable": "Market brief — USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base:
• USDC is the dominant stablecoin on Base, powering most onchain commerce pairs [1].
• Native USDC issuance replaced bridged USDbC, simplifying liquidity for builders [2].
• Payment-agent protocols settle micro-transactions in USDC escrow on Base.
• Weekly active addresses interacting with USDC contracts keep growing.
• Risk caveat: issuer concentration means depeg or freeze events remain a systemic risk.
Sources: [1] basescan.org analytics, [2] Circle announcement.", "instruction": "You are adjudicating an insurance claim. Decide ONLY whether seller_delivery fulfils buyer_requirement — the thing the BUYER originally hired the SELLER to produce. PASS if the delivery meets the requirement, FAIL if it does not. Judge the delivery, not the buyer.", "requirements": "Write a 5-bullet market brief about the USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base, with at least two cited sources and one risk caveat.", "seller_delivery": "Market brief — USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base:
• USDC is the dominant stablecoin on Base, powering most onchain commerce pairs [1].
• Native USDC issuance replaced bridged USDbC, simplifying liquidity for builders [2].
• Payment-agent protocols settle micro-transactions in USDC escrow on Base.
• Weekly active addresses interacting with USDC contracts keep growing.
• Risk caveat: issuer concentration means depeg or freeze events remain a systemic risk.
Sources: [1] basescan.org analytics, [2] Circle announcement.", "buyer_requirement": "Write a 5-bullet market brief about the USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base, with at least two cited sources and one risk caveat."}

reasons: The delivery provides a concise market brief on the USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base, covering key points like dominance, native issuance, payment-agent protocols, growth, and risk caveats, which aligns with the buyer's request for a market brief.
result.note: Independent third-party adjudication by CrooCred. The evidence hash commits to the exact claim input and verdict; verify by re-hashing.
